features: ✅ Total of 152 Wax Strips – Includes 72 Aloe Vera strips (Face & Bikini Line) and 80 Vitamin E strips (Legs & Body) for complete hair removal coverage.
Infused with Soothing Ingredients – Aloe Vera variant enriched with Grape Seed Oil; Vitamin E variant enhanced with Shea Butter, Cherry Oil, and Vitamin E for gentle care.
✨ Effective on Short Hair (From 2mm) – Quickly removes even the shortest hairs for smooth, hair-free skin.
🧖‍♀️ Suitable for All Skin Types – Dermatologically tested; ideal for sensitive areas as well as larger body parts
⏱️ Long-Lasting Smoothness – Leaves skin silky smooth for up to 4 weeks
🖐️ New Improved Grip – Easy-to-use strips with better hold for quicker and cleaner removal.
description: Product description Beauty Formulas wax strips are hair removal strips for the legs and body. Featuring moisturising Vitamin E. Ingredients. Wax box contains wax strips. Safety Warning Keep Away from Children

specifications_table.Benefits: Removes hair from the root, including short hair as small as 2mm, Keeps skin smooth for up to 4 weeks.
